name: Mana
tagline: Manipulate raw magic and other casters' resources.

baseAbility.name: Expunge / Manipulate
baseAbility.description: Standard action, close range, ranged touch attack, 0 SP. Expunge applies the Spellburn talent to a target (dealing spell point damage to their pool). Manipulate (touch) applies Gift of Knowledge, letting you temporarily lend a magic talent you know to another caster of your creature type for a short time. Both are governed by (expunge) and (manipulation) talents that add more options.

talents.name: Spellburn (expunge)
talents.description: The base expunge effect: deals direct spell point damage to a target's pool on a failed save.

talents.name: Gift of Knowledge (manipulation)
talents.description: The base manipulate effect: temporarily share a magic talent you know with a willing creature of your own type.

talents.name: Mana Siphon (blast type, cross-sphere w/ Destruction)
talents.description: Recover some of the spell points you drain from a target as your own temporary spell points.

talents.name: Knowledge Drain (advanced)
talents.description: Advanced manipulation option: temporarily steal a talent from a target rather than only sharing your own.

talents.name: Manathief (advanced, expunge)
talents.description: Advanced expunge option: convert drained spell points into your own temporary spell points instead of just damaging the target's pool.

talents.name: Mass Expunge
talents.description: Apply your expunge effect to 1 extra target per 2 CL (min 1) at once.

talents.name: Ranged Manipulation
talents.description: Manipulate works at close range instead of requiring touch. Repeatable to extend range further.

talents.name: Explosive Expunge
talents.description: Expunge also deals a small amount of direct hit point damage in addition to spell point damage.

talents.name: Manabond (manabond)
talents.description: Create a lingering magical link ('manabond') with a target, opening up manabond-tagged talents that interact with it over time.

talents.name: Retained Imbuement
talents.description: Temporary spell points you gain from Mana sphere effects last longer and are less easily lost.
